title: Caduceus
description: A Clojure-based Hex Casting addon for advanced meta-evaluation.
body: # Caduceus [CurseForge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/caduceus) | [GitHub](https://github.com/object-Object/Caduceus) A Clojure-based Hex Casting addon for advanced meta-evaluation. Created for HexJam 2025. ## Features - Adds the following meta-evaluation features: - Delimited continuations - Continuation marks - Jump iota manipulation - Improved jump iota display - All non-mixin code is written in Clojure. - On Fabric, support is automatically added for third-party continuation frame types by scanning the classpath and generating a mixin at runtime with a dynamic `targets` list. ## Attribution - Icon: SamsTheNerd ([GitHub](https://github.com/SamsTheNerd), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/SamsTheNerd))
